concerns: main.ts imports CSS (line 1) and queries DOM at module scope (line 7) — the smoke test must configure Vitest CSS handling (e.g., css: true or mock) and inject #app into jsdom BEFORE the dynamic import, or the test will fail silently

main.ts has no exports; the plan says 'mock module imports' but should explicitly state the technique: vi.mock() the 4 dependencies, set up document with #app div, then dynamic-import main.ts to trigger its side effects

Deferring Playwright is pragmatic but AC 4 literally says 'Main page smoke test exists' — a jsdom-based test is a reasonable substitute only if stakeholders agree that a unit-level smoke test satisfies this criterion
